_comment: Creator OS capability flags. Set to true only when the capability is actually available in your environment. The system reads this file to gracefully degrade features that require local tooling. Non-technical users: you only need to touch this file if you install something new.
_local_override: To set your own flags without affecting git pull, copy this file to creator-os-config.local.json in the same directory. The .local.json file is gitignored and its capability flags always win over these defaults. You only need to copy the keys you want to override.
_connectors_note: The connector registry at shared/connectors/ provides a richer evidence-routing model built on these flags. Run: python3 shared/connectors/connectors.py --plan to see which data sources (YouTube API, SQLite cache, etc.) are active and which evidence types each one provides. The get_connectors MCP tool exposes this via Claude Desktop.

mcp_server.description: MCP server running (Claude Desktop only). Enables: cache queries, competitor scans, source staleness, quality scoring, drift check.

competitor_snapshots.description: Local SQLite competitor index exists. Enables: competitor_scan MCP tool, deep-competitor-scan atom in cached mode.

keyword_cache.description: FTS5 keyword cache built. Enables: cache_query MCP tool, fast offline keyword lookups.

playwright.description: Playwright installed. Enables: rendered HTML snapshots of competitor pages (Pinterest, Instagram).

youtube_api.description: YouTube Data API v3 credentials configured. Enables: creator's own analytics, caption download, live video metadata.

instagram_api.description: Meta Graph API credentials configured. Enables: Reels insights, Business Discovery for competitor monitoring.

tiktok_api.description: TikTok Content Posting API credentials configured. Enables: caption and hashtag publishing, display API lookups.

pinterest_api.description: Pinterest API v5 credentials configured. Enables: pin analytics, board data, trend data queries.

voice_profile.description: voice-profile.json populated with real phrases. Enables: personalized voice in scripts, captions, and pitch copy.

channel_context.description: channel-context.json populated with real channel stats. Enables: grounded rate recommendations and benchmark comparisons.
channel_context.requires: Edit pipeline/user-context/channel-context.json with subscriber count and avg views

google_workspace.description: Google Workspace connected (Gmail, Calendar, Drive/Docs/Sheets). Enables: brand email reading, calendar sync, document and analytics import.
google_workspace.requires: Run python3 tools/wizard.py and connect your Google account (Claude Desktop), or go to claude.ai Settings > Integrations > Google Workspace (claude.ai Projects)

microsoft_365.description: Microsoft 365 connected (Outlook email, Calendar, Excel, OneDrive). Enables: brand email reading, calendar sync, spreadsheet analytics import.
microsoft_365.requires: Run python3 tools/wizard.py and connect your Microsoft account (Claude Desktop only; requires Node.js 20+)

wolfram_alpha.description: Wolfram Alpha MCP connected. Enables: exact symbolic computation, unit conversion, mathematical proofs, statistical distributions.
wolfram_alpha.requires: uvx mcp-wolfram-alpha configured in Claude Desktop + WOLFRAM_APP_ID env var (free at developer.wolframalpha.com, 2000 calls/month)

e2b_sandbox.description: E2B Code Interpreter MCP connected. Enables: sandboxed Python with scipy, numpy, pandas, matplotlib for statistical analysis and visualization.
e2b_sandbox.requires: E2B MCP configured in Claude Desktop + E2B_API_KEY env var (free tier at e2b.dev)

duckdb_analytics.description: DuckDB MCP connected. Enables: analytical SQL over CSV, Parquet, and JSON files. No API key needed for local mode.

stats_compass.description: stats-compass-mcp connected. Enables: 50+ pandas-based statistical tools (t-tests, ANOVA, chi-square, correlation matrices).
stats_compass.requires: pip install stats-compass-mcp + configured in Claude Desktop

jupyter_notebook.description: Jupyter MCP connected. Enables: persistent notebook sessions with full Python scientific stack.

r_statistics.description: R Statistics MCP connected (rmcp). Enables: 52 R statistical tools for advanced modeling.
r_statistics.requires: R installed + rmcp configured in Claude Desktop

monte_carlo.description: Monte Carlo Simulation MCP connected. Enables: probabilistic modeling, risk analysis, revenue forecasting.

scikit_learn.description: scikit-learn MCP connected. Enables: ML classification, regression, clustering for audience segmentation and trend prediction.

gemini_gem_export.description: Gemini Gem export packaging available. Enables: export-gem atom to package Creator OS for Google Gemini Gems.
gemini_gem_export.requires: No external dependency. Enable to activate the export-gem atom.

custom_gpt_export.description: Custom GPT export packaging available. Enables: export-gpt atom to package Creator OS for OpenAI Custom GPTs.
custom_gpt_export.requires: No external dependency. Enable to activate the export-gpt atom.

youtube_publishing.description: YouTube video upload and scheduling via Data API v3. Enables: schedule-post atom to upload videos with publishAt scheduling. Separate from read-only youtube_api flag.
youtube_publishing.requires: OAuth credentials with youtube.upload scope in pipeline/user-context/api-credentials.local.json

instagram_publishing.description: Instagram Reel publishing via Graph API v25.0. Enables: schedule-post atom to post Reels via the two-step container+publish flow. Separate from read-only instagram_api flag.
instagram_publishing.requires: Meta app credentials with instagram_business_content_publish scope in pipeline/user-context/api-credentials.local.json

tiktok_publishing.description: TikTok video posting via Content Posting API. Enables: schedule-post atom with AIGC flag support. Rate limit: 6 req/min. Separate from read-only tiktok_api flag.
tiktok_publishing.requires: TikTok developer app credentials with video.publish scope in pipeline/user-context/api-credentials.local.json

pinterest_publishing.description: Pinterest pin creation and scheduling via API v5. Enables: schedule-post atom with board targeting and scheduled_at datetime. Separate from read-only pinterest_api flag.
pinterest_publishing.requires: Pinterest developer app credentials with pins:write scope in pipeline/user-context/api-credentials.local.json

degraded_behavior.mcp_server_disabled: All MCP tools (cache_query, competitor_scan, etc.) are unavailable. Use knowledge-only spokes. Competition estimates remain [estimated]. Source staleness cannot be checked automatically.
degraded_behavior.competitor_snapshots_disabled: deep-competitor-scan falls back to live web-intel-engine mode. No ytInitialPlayerResponse tag extraction. Output labeled [web-mode: no snapshot saved].
degraded_behavior.keyword_cache_disabled: keyword lookups use in-context knowledge from canonical-sources/ loaded into the system. Slower and token-intensive. Build the cache for faster results.
degraded_behavior.api_disabled: Platform API data (view counts, engagement rates, analytics) is unavailable. All metrics are [estimated] or [null — not provided]. Never fabricated.
degraded_behavior.voice_profile_disabled: Scripts and captions use seed vocabulary from voice-engine.md. Personalized phrases from actual content are not available yet.
degraded_behavior.channel_context_disabled: Rate recommendations use industry benchmark ranges from canonical-sources/rate-benchmarks. Not grounded in actual channel performance.
degraded_behavior.wolfram_disabled: Exact computation unavailable. Arithmetic results are best-effort estimates labeled [estimated]. Never present unverified arithmetic as precise.
degraded_behavior.e2b_disabled: Sandboxed Python unavailable. Statistical analysis limited to conceptual guidance. Cannot generate charts or run iterative algorithms.
degraded_behavior.duckdb_disabled: Analytical SQL unavailable. CSV/Parquet/JSON files cannot be queried directly. Use manual data inspection or cache_query for keyword data.
degraded_behavior.stats_compass_disabled: Pandas-based statistical tools unavailable. Hypothesis testing and correlation analysis limited to conceptual recommendations.
degraded_behavior.jupyter_disabled: Persistent notebook sessions unavailable. Multi-step computations cannot maintain state across turns.
degraded_behavior.stats_general_disabled: When no statistical MCP is available, all statistical atoms produce guidance-only output: they describe what test to run and provide runnable Python/R code, but do not compute results. All outputs labeled [guidance-only].
degraded_behavior.gem_export_disabled: Gemini Gem packaging unavailable. Use the manual export files in implementation/gemini/ instead.
degraded_behavior.gpt_export_disabled: Custom GPT packaging unavailable. Use the manual export files in implementation/gpt/ instead.
degraded_behavior.publishing_disabled: All per-platform publishing flags are off. schedule-post falls back to publish-draft (manual mode). Output includes a paste-ready caption, platform-specific posting checklist, and FTC reminder. No posts are queued or published automatically. Use the scheduling dashboard (tools/dashboard/) to manage posts visually.
degraded_behavior.per_platform_publishing_disabled: All per-platform publishing flags (youtube_publishing, instagram_publishing, tiktok_publishing, pinterest_publishing) are off. Every schedule-post call returns publishing_tier: manual and status: manual_required. Use publish-draft to get formatted paste-ready copy and a platform-specific posting checklist.

web_app_note: If you are using Claude Projects on claude.ai or ChatGPT custom instructions, all mcp_server, competitor_snapshots, keyword_cache, and API capabilities are unavailable. The system automatically operates in knowledge-only mode. You still get: full hub routing, all 14 spokes, all atoms, voice-engine rules, protocol enforcement, and seasonal SEO guidance — without any local tools.
